sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74894" key="o)rewpole/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρεω-πολέω</orth>, <sense id="n74894.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tend mules,</tr_> and <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀρεω-πώλης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mule-dealer,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
